[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 01010100 3
2 10001010 3
3 01100000 2
4 00011100 3
5 10001000 2
6 11110100 5
7 00111100 4
